user.title: Terneo Thermostat
user.description: Enter the IP address and serial number of your Terneo device. The serial number is printed on a sticker on the device and is visible on its local page at http://<device ip>/index.html.

data.name: Name
data.totp_key: TOTP key (leave blank if LAN lock is off)
data.power_watts: Heater power (watts, 0 to disable power sensor)
data.primary_sensor: Temperature shown on the thermostat entity

data.name: Name
data.totp_key: TOTP key (leave blank if LAN lock is off)
data.power_watts: Heater power (watts, 0 to disable power sensor)
data.primary_sensor: Temperature shown on the thermostat entity

fetch_totp.title: Fetch TOTP key from Terneo cloud
fetch_totp.description: Enter your my.terneo.ua account credentials. They are used once to fetch the device key and are not stored.

totp_method.skip_totp: Continue without TOTP (LAN lock is off)
totp_method.fetch_totp: Fetch TOTP key from Terneo cloud account

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the device. Check the IP address and that the local API is unlocked (bLc → off).
error.cloud_auth_failed: Cloud login failed. Check your my.terneo.ua email and password.
error.cloud_device_not_found: Device serial not found in your Terneo cloud account.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. See Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.invalid_discovery: The discovery broadcast was missing required fields.

data.primary_sensor: Temperature shown on the thermostat entity
